attempts.strategy: Abstract mate identity: pseudofunctoriality of the pullback-pushforward unit for composable a:X1->X2, b:X2->X3 and N on the CODOMAIN X3. Proof = unit_conjugateEquiv ((adj b).comp (adj a)) (adj (a*b)) (pullbackComp a b).inv N, then rw [conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv, Adjunction.comp_unit_app], then rw [<- Category.assoc]; exact h.

Ring side: IsLocalization.surj clears denominator (h*algebraMap s = algebraMap a, s unit, a!=0 so g*a!=0); Associated(algebraMap a) h via unit algebraMap s; IsLocalization.Away.mul_of_associated gives Away(g*a) on A_h. Module side: composite psi : T ->L[A] D is IsLocalizedModule(powers(g*a)) via IsBaseChange.comp. Transport: sigma := IsLocalization.algEquiv; Module.compHom action; Module.Basis.mapCoeffs sigma.symm; LinearEquiv.extendScalarsOfIsLocalization; Module.Free.of_equiv'.
